/CAL: DEFENSE MOTION TO MODIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS/X: THE DEFENDANT APPEARSIN COURT VIA ZOOM/ARG&SUB/MO GRTD/EMMOD: THE DEFENDANT IS ALLOWED TO TRAVEL OUTSIDE THE 50 MILE RADIUS WITH PRIOR WRITTEN NOTIFICATION FROM HIS EMPLOYER (DISPATCH GOODS)  WITH ITINERARY AND SUBMITTED TO THE SAN FRANCISCOSHERIFF'S  DEPARTMENT PRIOR TO TRAVELING, HE MAY NOT TRAVEL OUTSIDE THE AREA FOR MORE THAN ONE (1) OVER NIGHT STAY PER ASSIGNMENT,/CONTD: PRELIMINARYHEARING/TE: 1 DAY/DOP/
/CAL:DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO MODIFY RELEASE TERMS/X:THE DEFENDANT APPEARS INCOURT VIA ZOOM TODAY,/CONTD:MOTION TO MODIFY RELEASE TERMS TO BE HEARD BYJUDGE DARWIN/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:THE DEFENDANT APPEARS IN COURT VIA ZOOM TODAY,//X:THE CO-DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE IS GRANTED,/EMMOD::  DEFENDANT IS PERMITTED TO TRAVEL OUTSIDE GPS MONITOR RADIUS TO LAKE MCSWAIN RECREATIONAL AREA FROM 04-15-22 9:00AM UNTIL 04-17-22 11:45PM/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 07-22-22/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING AND DEFENSE MOTION TO CONTINUE/X:THE DEFENDANT APPEARS IN COURT VIA ZOOM,/X:DEFENSE MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE IS GRANTED,/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON 02-08-22/DOP/X:DEFENDANT MAY APPEAR VIA ZOOM FOR PREHEARING CONFERENCE,/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 04-08-22/DOP/EMMOD:: DEFENDANT PERMITTED TRAVEL OUTSIDE 50 MILE GPS RADIUS TO MODESTO CALIFORNIA ON 02-05-22 FROM 6:00 AM TO 11:00 PM/
/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO WITHDRAW AS COUNSEL/MO GRTD/X:RANDALL KNOX IS RELIEVED AS COUNSEL/CON:BRIAN BERSON/X:(JAMES SENAL SPECIALLY APPEARED FOR BRIAN BERSON)/CONTD:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/STWPX/X: PEOPLE'S MOTIONTO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL FILED AND DENIED/X: EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL FILED/X: ORDER SEALING EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF MOTIONTO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL FILED/X:AS A CONDITION OF BAIL THE DEFENDANT WILLREPORT TO ACM AND SHALL NOT POSSES ANY WEAPONS/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLYWITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THEDEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONSAT THAT TIME,/WS/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING (TE 1 DAY)/DOP/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 04-08-22 IS CONFIRMED,
